name: Nellie Cochrane
title: Voice of Disorder

abilities.name: Gather 'round!
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to heal 2 on itself and allies within (r) 4".

abilities.name: Public Outcry
abilities.text: When this model is targeted by an attack action, if this crew's scandal bar is half full or more, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Spread the Word
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 8" resolves the Interact action, it gains an Entranced token.

actions.name: Spew Nonsense
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: "Could this be... Betrayal?"
triggers.text: Target declares the Charge action, ignoring engagement, controlled by this model.

actions.name: Sow Chaos
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may decrease this crew's scandal bar by 2 to receive a raise.
actions.effects: Choose and apply one of the following effects, plus an additional effect for each raise, in an order of your choosing.

actions.name: Lunacy
actions.effects: Draw a number of cards equal to enemy models within range with an Entranced token (to a maximum of 2).

extraction_notes: Sow Chaos has sub-effects listed: 'Evil Thoughts: Move the target 5". Hard-Hitting Journalism: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage. Mob Rules: An ally engaged with the target may declare a (m) action. Stuttering: Target gains either an Entranced or Slow token.' These are part of the effects text and represent choices within the action resolution.
